package rulecoverage

func NegativeCrossRepositoryWriteFlowWithoutSharedUowBoundary() string {
    ruleID := "cross_repository_write_flow_without_shared_uow_boundary"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Service methods coordinating several repositories with no explicit shared transaction or consistency boundary."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
